## Agent-kit PR

- [ ] `agent-kit/manifest.toml` version bumped
- [ ] `agent-kit/CHANGELOG.md` updated
- [ ] `./scripts/verify-agent-kit.sh` passes
- [ ] Follow-up **lic** PR will run `./scripts/sync-agent-kit.sh lic` (separate PR after merge)
- [ ] No weakening of `guard-*.sh` without maintainer approval

## Test plan

- [ ] Roadmap CI green
- [ ] Reviewer merges (not author)
